## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new hires to GrowthX's company operations and tools](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Onboarding is a work in progress; focus on getting familiar with tools and company context this week](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Key tools: Linear (project management), Slack, Notion, One Password, Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Content managers have a 2-week onboarding bootcamp starting tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Daily stand-ups via Geekbot in Slack for visibility and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Onboarding Process

  - [GrowthX is a rapidly growing startup (50+ employees)](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Two main orgs: "deliver" (client-facing) and "build" (internal operations)](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Onboarding simplified to reduce overwhelm](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Linear used for project management and onboarding tasks](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Emphasis on reading company documentation for context](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Day One Priorities

  - [Set up and familiarize with tools: Notion, Zoom, Fathom, One Password, email, Linear, Slack](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Complete "Day One Tools" checklist in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Update Slack profile with full name, title, bio, and location](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with manager and identify onboarding buddy](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

### Week One Focus

  - [Read through company documentation (policies, strategy, pitch deck)](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Watch shortened workshop video (2 hours) for insight into GrowthX's approach](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Attend three onboarding sessions: Marcel (strategy), Daniel (product), Kyle (customer use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

### Content Manager Onboarding

  - [Special two-week bootcamp starting tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Focus on understanding content strategy before diving into AI tools and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Culminates in a writing deliverable for a hypothetical customer](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Communication and Visibility

  - [Use "D onboarding" Slack channel for questions](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Daily stand-ups via Geekbot in Slack for team visibility](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)
  - [Working in the open concept to avoid redundancy and increase awareness](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete Day One Tools checklist in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Read through company documentation and watch workshop video](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Attend scheduled onboarding sessions this week](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Content managers: Prepare for bootcamp starting tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Check Slack for manager assignments and reach out to schedule 1:1](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
  - [Join relevant Slack channels and start participating in daily stand-ups](https://fathom.video/share/cLyswJ3D7rxfifzo1xxjNYUSDZ-Pnsrf?tab=summary&timestamp=2241.0)
